crisis.banner: If you are experiencing a mental health emergency, call 911 or go to your nearest emergency department.

footer.rights: All rights reserved. Individual results are not guaranteed and may vary from person to person.

common.noPhiNotice: Please do not include medical information or confidential health information in this form.

appointmentForm.heading: Request an appointment
appointmentForm.contactConsent: I consent to be contacted by Fresh Start Behavioral Health about my request. I understand not to include medical or confidential health information in this form.
appointmentForm.smsConsent: I consent to receive appointment reminders and scheduling updates by text message to the phone number provided. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
appointmentForm.successHeading: Thank you — we'll be in touch.
appointmentForm.successBody: A team member will contact you using your preferred method. For urgent needs, please call 937-579-0073.
appointmentForm.validationGeneric: Please check the form and try again.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for may have moved or no longer exists.
errors.serverBody: We're experiencing a technical issue. If you need immediate support, please call us directly.
